message:
fix(engine): length-prefix attestation handshake canonical bytes and skip signing key in serde

Add length-prefixed encoding to cell_id, signer_public_key, key_binding_proof,
and claimed_capabilities in AttestationResponse::canonical_bytes to prevent
delimiter collisions in the signed preimage. Mark PolicyPlaneVerifier.signing_key
with #[serde(skip)] to prevent accidental key leakage through serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
